TestCaseName: Product grid is displayed on home page
ExpectedResult: A grid of product cards is visible

TestCaseName: Each product card shows image name and price
Steps: 1. Inspect product cards in the grid
ExpectedResult: Each card displays: product image | product name | product price

TestCaseName: Clicking product card navigates to detail page
PreConditions: Home page loaded with product grid
ExpectedResult: User is navigated to the product detail page for that product

TestCaseName: Product detail page displays all required information
PreConditions: Navigate to any product detail page
Steps: 1. Click a product from the overview
ExpectedResult: Page shows: image | name | description | price | category badge | brand badge

TestCaseName: Related products section is shown
Steps: 1. Scroll to the bottom of the product detail page
ExpectedResult: A related products section is visible below main product info

TestCaseName: Clicking related product navigates to its detail page
PreConditions: Product detail page with related products visible
ExpectedResult: User is navigated to that related product's detail page

TestCaseName: Category page displays products for selected category
Steps: 1. Click on a category name in navigation
ExpectedResult: A page with products belonging to that category is displayed

TestCaseName: Category name shown as page title
ExpectedResult: The category name is shown as the page title

TestCaseName: Only category-specific products are shown
ExpectedResult: Only products that belong to the selected category are displayed

TestCaseName: Contact form is accessible via navigation
ExpectedResult: A contact form is displayed on the contact page

TestCaseName: All required fields are present
ExpectedResult: Fields present: First name | Last name | Email | Subject (dropdown) | Message

TestCaseName: Subject dropdown contains all required options
ExpectedResult: Options include: Customer service | Webmaster | Return | Payments | Warranty | Status of order

TestCaseName: Message under 50 characters shows validation error
Steps: 1. Enter a message fewer than 50 characters 2. Attempt to submit
ExpectedResult: Validation error shown: message must be at least 50 characters

TestCaseName: Successful form submission shows confirmation
Steps: 1. Fill all required fields with valid data 2. Click Submit
ExpectedResult: Confirmation message is displayed and form is hidden

TestCaseName: Pagination controls appear when products exceed one page
PreConditions: Home page loaded with many products
Steps: 1. Observe the bottom of the product grid
ExpectedResult: Pagination controls are displayed

TestCaseName: Clicking a page number updates the product grid
ExpectedResult: Product grid updates to show that page's products; clicked page is highlighted

TestCaseName: Search input is visible on product overview
ExpectedResult: A search input field is displayed

TestCaseName: Search with fewer than 3 characters triggers validation
Steps: 1. Type 2 characters in the search box 2. Submit search
ExpectedResult: Validation error is shown

TestCaseName: Search input accepts maximum 40 characters
Steps: 1. Attempt to type more than 40 characters
ExpectedResult: Input is limited to 40 characters

TestCaseName: Valid search filters the product grid
Steps: 1. Enter a valid product name (3-40 chars) 2. Submit
ExpectedResult: Product grid updates to show only matching products

TestCaseName: Search resets all active filters
PreConditions: Home page with category filter applied
Steps: 1. Apply a category filter 2. Perform a search
ExpectedResult: Category | brand | and sort filters are all reset; grid shows search results

TestCaseName: Category filter shows as checkboxes in sidebar
ExpectedResult: Categories are listed as checkboxes

TestCaseName: Categories display in parent/child tree hierarchy
ExpectedResult: Categories are shown in a tree with parent/child relationships

TestCaseName: Checking parent category checks all child categories
Steps: 1. Click on a parent category checkbox
ExpectedResult: All child categories are checked and product grid updates

TestCaseName: Unchecking all children unchecks the parent
PreConditions: Parent category and all children checked
Steps: 1. Uncheck each child category one by one
ExpectedResult: When last child is unchecked, the parent is also unchecked

TestCaseName: Brand filter shows as checkboxes in sidebar
ExpectedResult: Brands are listed as checkboxes

TestCaseName: Selecting a brand filters products to that brand
ExpectedResult: Product grid updates to show only products from that brand

TestCaseName: Category and brand filters can be used together
Steps: 1. Select a category 2. Select a brand
ExpectedResult: Product grid shows products matching both category AND brand

TestCaseName: Sort dropdown is visible on product overview
ExpectedResult: A sort dropdown is displayed

TestCaseName: Name A-Z sorting orders products alphabetically
ExpectedResult: Products are ordered from A to Z by name

TestCaseName: Name Z-A sorting orders products reverse alphabetically
ExpectedResult: Products are ordered from Z to A by name

TestCaseName: Price High-Low sorting orders products by descending price
ExpectedResult: Products are ordered from highest to lowest price

TestCaseName: Price Low-High sorting orders products by ascending price
ExpectedResult: Products are ordered from lowest to highest price

TestCaseName: Quantity selector with +/- buttons is shown
ExpectedResult: Quantity selector with + and - buttons is visible; default is 1

TestCaseName: Plus button increases quantity by 1
ExpectedResult: Quantity increments to 2

TestCaseName: Minus button decreases quantity by 1
Steps: 1. Set quantity to 2 2. Click the - button
ExpectedResult: Quantity decrements to 1

TestCaseName: Minimum quantity cannot go below 1
ExpectedResult: Quantity stays at 1; does not go to 0

TestCaseName: Add to Cart shows success message
ExpectedResult: Success message: Product added to shopping cart.

TestCaseName: Out of stock product disables Add to Cart
Steps: 1. Inspect the Add to Cart button
ExpectedResult: Button is disabled and Out of stock is shown in red

TestCaseName: Rentals page is accessible
ExpectedResult: All rental products are listed

TestCaseName: Rental product cards show image name and description
ExpectedResult: Each rental card shows an image, name, and description

TestCaseName: Rental detail shows duration slider (1-10 hours)
Steps: 1. Navigate to a rental product detail
ExpectedResult: A duration slider from 1 to 10 hours is displayed

TestCaseName: Rental total price calculates correctly by duration
Steps: 1. Move the slider to 3 hours 2. Observe total price
ExpectedResult: Total = hourly rate x selected duration

TestCaseName: Rental items are marked in cart
Steps: 1. Add a rental product to cart 2. Open cart
ExpectedResult: Rental item is marked as This is a rental item

TestCaseName: Cart table shows correct columns

ExpectedResult: Table shows: Item | Quantity | Price | Total | Actions

Steps: 1. Change quantity of an item 2. Confirm
ExpectedResult: Item total and cart total are recalculated; confirmation message shown

ExpectedResult: Item is removed; cart total is recalculated

TestCaseName: Empty cart shows appropriate message

TestCaseName: Proceed button requires at least one item

ExpectedResult: Proceed button is disabled or user cannot advance

TestCaseName: Valid billing address allows proceeding to payment
Steps: 1. Fill all required fields with valid data 2. Click Proceed
ExpectedResult: User advances to the payment step

TestCaseName: Payment method dropdown contains all options
ExpectedResult: Options: Bank Transfer | Cash on Delivery | Credit Card | Buy Now Pay Later | Gift Card

TestCaseName: Selecting a payment method shows relevant fields
ExpectedResult: Account name and account number fields are displayed

TestCaseName: Successful order shows confirmation with invoice number

Steps: 1. Complete checkout with valid payment info 2. Submit
ExpectedResult: Confirmation message shown with invoice number; cart is cleared

TestCaseName: Add to Favorites button shown on product detail

TestCaseName: Login form is accessible

TestCaseName: Email field requires valid format

TestCaseName: Password field is required

TestCaseName: Valid credentials authenticate user and redirect

TestCaseName: Email format is validated
